PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -LocalPort 5173,5174,5175,5176,5177,5178 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "Killed PID $\($_.OwningProcess\) on port $\($_.LocalPort\)" })

Bash(node -e "const d = require\('./public/data/manhattan/land.json'\); console.log\('keys:', Object.keys\(d\)\); console.log\('landmasses:', d.landmasses.length\); console.log\('first:', { name: d.landmasses[0].name, outerLen: d.landmasses[0].outer?.length, sample: d.landmasses[0].outer?.slice\(0,2\) }\); const all = d.landmasses.flatMap\(lm => lm.outer || []\); let mnX=Infinity,mxX=-Infinity,mnZ=Infinity,mxZ=-Infinity; for \(const [x,z] of all\) { if \(x<mnX\) mnX=x; if \(x>mxX\) mxX=x; if \(z<mnZ\) mnZ=z; if \(z>mxZ\) mxZ=z; } console.log\('world bbox:', { mnX, mxX, mnZ, mxZ }\);")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('d:/Projects/Personal Website/3d-city/public/data/manhattan/land.json'\); console.log\(Object.keys\(d\)\); console.log\('landmasses type:', typeof d.landmasses, Array.isArray\(d.landmasses\) ? 'len=' + d.landmasses.length : ''\);")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('d:/Projects/Personal Website/3d-city/public/data/manhattan/land.json'\); const lm=d.landmasses[0]; console.log\('keys:', Object.keys\(lm\)\); console.log\('outer len:', lm.outer?.length\); console.log\('first 3 pts:', lm.outer?.slice\(0,3\)\); let mn=[Infinity,Infinity], mx=[-Infinity,-Infinity]; for \(const lm of d.landmasses\) { if \(!lm.outer\) continue; for \(const [x,z] of lm.outer\) { if \(x<mn[0]\)mn[0]=x; if \(z<mn[1]\)mn[1]=z; if \(x>mx[0]\)mx[0]=x; if \(z>mx[1]\)mx[1]=z; }} console.log\('global bbox:', mn, mx\);")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('d:/Projects/Personal Website/3d-city/public/data/manhattan/land.json'\); const names=new Set\(\); let manhattanLm=null; for\(const lm of d.landmasses\){ if\(lm.name\) names.add\(lm.name\); if\(lm.name==='Manhattan'\){manhattanLm=lm;}} console.log\('names:', [...names]\); if\(manhattanLm\){let mn=[Infinity,Infinity], mx=[-Infinity,-Infinity]; for \(const [x,z] of manhattanLm.outer\) { if \(x<mn[0]\)mn[0]=x; if \(z<mn[1]\)mn[1]=z; if \(x>mx[0]\)mx[0]=x; if \(z>mx[1]\)mx[1]=z; } console.log\('Manhattan bbox:', mn, mx\);}")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('d:/Projects/Personal Website/3d-city/public/data/manhattan/land.json'\); const buckets={}; for\(const lm of d.landmasses\){ const n=lm.name||'?'; buckets[n]=\(buckets[n]||0\)+1; } console.log\('counts by name:', buckets\); let mn=[Infinity,Infinity], mx=[-Infinity,-Infinity]; for \(const lm of d.landmasses\) { if\(lm.name!=='Manhattan'\)continue; for \(const [x,z] of lm.outer\) { if \(x<mn[0]\)mn[0]=x; if \(z<mn[1]\)mn[1]=z; if \(x>mx[0]\)mx[0]=x; if \(z>mx[1]\)mx[1]=z; }} console.log\('Manhattan combined bbox:', mn, mx\);")

Bash(node -e "const m=require\('d:/Projects/Personal Website/3d-city/public/data/manhattan/manifest.json'\); console.log\('keys:', Object.keys\(m\)\); console.log\('tile count:', m.tiles?.length\); console.log\('first tile:', JSON.stringify\(m.tiles?.[0]\)\); let mn=[Infinity,Infinity], mx=[-Infinity,-Infinity]; for \(const t of m.tiles\) { const b=t.bounds; if\(b.minX<mn[0]\)mn[0]=b.minX; if\(b.minZ<mn[1]\)mn[1]=b.minZ; if\(b.maxX>mx[0]\)mx[0]=b.maxX; if\(b.maxZ>mx[1]\)mx[1]=b.maxZ;} console.log\('manifest bbox:', mn, mx\);")
